name: opentofu
description: Guarded OpenTofu skills, typed local MCP tools, and an interactive operations dashboard for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run safe OpenTofu workflows from local validation to GitOps review.
interface.longDescription: A multi-skill OpenTofu pack with a local Go MCP server and interactive dashboard for preflight, policy evidence, immutable plans, bounded evidence reads, and single-use confirmed applies.
defaultPrompt: Validate and plan an OpenTofu stack with safety checks.
Run drift and policy checks before an environment change.
Generate a reviewable OpenTofu plan artifact for CI.
